data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Higher Ahead Of Festive Weekend: 'Current Equity Levels Offer An Attractive Entry Opportunity'
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Thursday ahead of the long weekend, with Good Friday falling on April 18 and Easter Sunday on April 20.

data.title: Vladimir Putin Hails Elon Musk, Compares Him To Soviet Space Program Pioneer: 'Such People Rarely Appear In The Human Population'
data.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin lauded SpaceX and Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk, drawing a comparison between him and Sergei Korolev, the architect of the Soviet Union's space victories in the mid-20th century.

data.title: Nancy Pelosi Called US-China Trade "A Job Loser:" Old Remarks Reemerge Amid Trump Tariff Push
data.description: A 29-year-old video of Rep. Nancy Pelosi resurfaces, showing her advocating for measures similar to Trump's tariff policies on China.

data.title: Not Buying A New Car? You May Still Pay An Extra $300 Due To Trump's Auto Tariffs: Here's More
data.description: President Donald Trump's auto tariffs are expected to drive up car insurance and repair costs, affecting even drivers who aren't buying new vehicles.

data.title: Millennium Management's Bitcoin And Ethereum ETFs Purchased In Q4 Suffer $22.7 Million Loss Amid Crypto Slump
